title: Aureline notebook share and handoff sheets with notebook-versus-report-versus-artifact scope separation
description: Boundary schema for notebook share sheets, handoff sheets, and scope-separation records. Every record that crosses the share/handoff boundary (share sheet, handoff sheet, share/handoff packet) projects through this schema. Raw notebook JSON bodies, raw cell source bytes, raw output bytes, raw kernel-protocol frames, raw widget state bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear in any record; records carry refs only. Additive-optional fields do not bump the schema_version; repurposing an existing member is breaking.

notebook_share_handoff_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the notebook share/handoff module. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles.

opaque_ref.description: Opaque ref to another record (cell id, output id, session id, document id, actor id, etc.). Consumers resolve refs through the owning registry.

notebook_scope_class.description: Frozen scope-class vocabulary. Names the separable scope of a share or handoff so consumers never conflate live runtime state with captured output or derived exports.

notebook_share_posture_class.description: Frozen share-posture vocabulary. Names the redaction and downgrade posture of a share so the UI shows redaction-before-share labels instead of optimistic placeholder language.

notebook_handoff_posture_class.description: Frozen handoff-posture vocabulary. Names the lifecycle state of a handoff so participants know whether the transfer is still actionable.

recipient_refs.description: Opaque refs to the recipients of the share.

redaction_explanation.description: Export-safe explanation when share_posture is redacted_before_share or degraded_scope.

cell_scope_refs.description: Opaque refs to the cells included in the share, when scope is partial.

handoff_explanation.description: Export-safe explanation when handoff_posture is declined or revoked.

as_of.description: UTC date this packet is current as of.

scope_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: scope classes. Must list every variant.

share_posture_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: share posture classes. Must list every variant.

handoff_posture_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: handoff posture classes. Must list every variant.
